---
title: "Random Thought"
subtitle: "Used to written by Chinese"
listing:
  contents: RT
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  image-align: left
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
